name: Loyalty: Reminder

description.en: Check for customers who haven't visited recently and send them a reminder.
description.de: Prüfe auf Kunden, die kürzlich nicht da waren, und sende eine Erinnerung.
description.fr: Reperez les clients qui ne sont pas revenus depuis un moment et envoyez-leur un rappel.
description.es: Busca clientes que no hayan venido ultimamente y enviales un recordatorio.
description.ro: Verifica clientii care nu au mai venit de ceva timp si trimite-le un memento.

bot: Daily scheduled. LOYALTY_SLUG from JOAI_WARP_BRAND. STALE_SINCE = now - (reminder_days * 86400). For each stale customer card ID: GET /v1/contacts?propKey=card&propValue={cardId} to find the JoAi contact, get their phone, send WhatsApp reminder via POST /social/send, log activity.

label.fr: Chargement de la configuration du programme...

label.ro: Se cauta clientii care trebuie contactati...

inputs.name: STALE_SINCE
inputs.bot: Calculate as: current unix timestamp minus (REMINDER_DAYS * 86400)
